description: Manually written skill labels for MC-Diamond, organized by tech-tree phase. Used as the 'manual' annotator_type in Q9 ablation.

wood.label: Collect wood from trees.
variants: Chop down trees to collect wood.
Collect wood from trees.
Mine wood from the tree trunk.

navigate_surface.label: Move towards the forest to gather resources.
variants: Move towards the forest to gather wood.
Move forward through the forest.
Explore the surface to find trees.

craft_table.label: Craft a crafting table from wooden planks.
variants: Craft a crafting table from wooden planks.
Place a crafting table to start crafting tools.

craft_wooden_pickaxe.label: Craft a wooden pickaxe using sticks and planks.
variants: Craft a wooden pickaxe using sticks and planks.
Craft a wooden pickaxe using the crafting table.
Craft a wooden pickaxe using planks and sticks.

dig_to_stone.label: Dig down to reach the stone layer.
variants: Dig down to reach the stone layer.
Dig down to reach stone underground.
Dig through dirt to reach stone.
Mine dirt blocks to clear a path.

mine_stone.label: Mine stone blocks to gather cobblestone.
variants: Mine stone blocks to gather cobblestone.
Mine stone blocks to collect cobblestone.
Mine stone to gather cobblestone.
Mine stone blocks with a wooden pickaxe.
Mine stone with a wooden pickaxe.

craft_stone_pickaxe.label: Craft a stone pickaxe from cobblestone.
variants: Craft a stone pickaxe from cobblestone.
Mine stone to craft a stone pickaxe.

craft_furnace.label: Craft a furnace from cobblestone.
variants: Craft a furnace from cobblestone.
Build a furnace to smelt ore.

dig_to_iron.label: Dig deep underground to find iron ore.
variants: Dig deep underground to find iron ore.
Dig down to find stone and iron ore.
Dig down to find stone and ores.
Dig down to reach underground caves.

mine_iron.label: Mine iron ore with a stone pickaxe.
variants: Mine iron ore with a stone pickaxe.
Mine iron ore blocks with a stone pickaxe.
Mine the iron ore with a stone pickaxe.

smelt_iron.label: Smelt iron ore in a furnace to get ingots.
variants: Smelt iron ore in a furnace to get ingots.
Collect coal or wood for smelting fuel.
Smelt iron to create iron ingots.

craft_iron_pickaxe.label: Craft an iron pickaxe from iron ingots.
variants: Craft an iron pickaxe from iron ingots.
Craft an iron pickaxe using the crafting table.

dig_to_diamond.label: Dig down to diamond level.
variants: Dig down to diamond level.
Mine deeper to find diamond ore.
Dig down to reach diamond depth.

mine_diamond.label: Mine diamond ore with an iron pickaxe.
variants: Mine diamond ore with an iron pickaxe.
Collect diamond ore blocks.
Mine the diamond ore.

return_to_surface.label: Dig upwards to reach the surface.
variants: Dig upwards to reach the surface.
Mine upwards to reach the surface.
Dig upwards to exit the cave.
Climb out of the cave to reach the surface.

navigate_water.label: Swim across water to reach the shore.
variants: Swim across water to reach the shore.
Swim across the river to reach the other side.
Swim across the water to reach the shore.

Craft a crafting table from wooden planks.
Craft a wooden pickaxe using sticks and planks.

Mine stone blocks to gather cobblestone.

Mine iron ore with a stone pickaxe.
Smelt iron ore in a furnace to get ingots.
Craft an iron pickaxe from iron ingots.
